bg:rgb(10, 126, 168) - primary teal/blue (header bar, brands section, service buttons, testimonials bg)
bg:rgb(216, 202, 80) - gold/yellow (hero bg, CTA bg, testimonial cards)
bg:rgb(255, 255, 255) - white (main header, service card bg)
text:rgb(10, 126, 168) - teal (nav links, footer logo link, icons)
text:rgb(216, 202, 80) - gold (active nav, button text on black bg)
text:rgb(231, 215, 104) - lighter gold (section titles on teal bg, footer headings)
text:rgb(255, 255, 255) - white (button text, text on dark/teal bg)
text:rgb(44, 62, 80) - dark blue-grey (body text, headings on light bg)
